title: Simple Microservices with .NET 6
description: A .NET 6 microservices sample that demonstrates service separation, API communication, and practical backend architecture fundamentals.

title: RESTful API with Go
description: A RESTful API built with Go and Gin, structured around Clean Architecture principles to keep the codebase maintainable and scalable.

title: RESTful API with .NET 6
description: A RESTful API built with .NET 6 and PostgreSQL, applying Clean Architecture to keep the application modular, testable, and easy to maintain.

title: Middleware and ESB Development with IBM Products
description: Hands-on ESB development experience using IBM Integration Toolkit, DataPower, API Manager, DB2, and Red Hat Server in enterprise middleware environments.
